THE COURT RULES ON DEFENDANTS' OBJECTIONS AS FOLLOWS: (A) 1-8- SUSTAINED; HEARSAY; (B) 9- OVERRULED; AGENT STATEMENT OF PARTY OPPONENT PER EC 1222; (C) 10 - SUSTAINED, NO FOUNDATION RE: PERSONAL KNOWLEDGE; (D) 11- SUSTAINED, SPECULATIVE; NO FOUNDATION RE: PERSONAL KNOWLEDGE. DEFENDANT REQUESTS THE COURT FOR ATTORNEY FEES WHICH IS DENIED AT THIS TIME. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH COMPLIANCE CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: L. calendar.matters:
Motion To Amend Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-23-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Edward Singer 650-393-5862 of The Law Offices of Edward Singer appearing via Zoom for plaintiff.
Craig Daniel 415-510-2114 of Gluck Daniel Atkinson LLP appearing via Zoom for defendant.

Hearing held. Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EDWARD DUFFY Motion To Amend Judgment is DENIED without prejudice. Insufficient evidence provided to show alter ego. The Court rules on Defendants' objections as follows: (a) 1-8- sustained; hearsay; (b) 9- overruled; agent statement of party opponent per EC 1222; (c) 10 - sustained, no foundation re: personal knowledge; (d) 11- sustained, speculative; no foundation re: personal knowledge. Defendant requests the court for attorney fees which is denied at this time.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the court's tentative ruling and in compliance with compliance CRC 3.1312(b)

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young; Not Reported. (D501)

for Defendant American West Parking Services, Inc.
Reported: Nancy E. Presant, CSR 906, 510.757.8550, npresantcsr@gmail.com.

Hearing held. Mr Daniels contests the tentative ruling.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF EDWARD DUFFY Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order is GRANTED as requested. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Reported: Nancy E. Presant, CSR 906, 510.757.8550, npresantcsr@gmail.com. (D501)
